title: Partition Equal Subset Sum
problem_statement: Determine whether the array can be partitioned into two subsets with equal sum.

examples.explanation: The array can be partitioned into [1,5,5] and [11].

intuition: Reduce to subset sum for target = total/2 and use DP to track reachable sums.

approaches.name: Subset sum DP
approaches.description: Use a boolean DP array to mark achievable sums and check if half the total is reachable.
approaches.why_not: Brute force subset enumeration is exponential in n.

interview_qa.q: Why check total sum parity first?
interview_qa.a: An odd total cannot be split into two equal integer subsets.
It means a subset sum of j is achievable with the processed numbers.
